subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion, confidant and cherished friend! Though I write at length, I cannot fully express the state of my innermost being, for this yearning heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم وهمدم و ندیم آنچه بنگارم شرح حال درون نتوانم که این قلب مشتاق
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
